body.title: CLOSED: palace_cli.py — ls/read/search/edit/delete subcommands
body.description:
Build scripts/palace_cli.py with subcommands: ls [prefix] (indented tree view); read <path> (full node); search <query> [--tag TAG] [--limit N]; edit <path> [--content TEXT] [--title TEXT] (upsert); delete <path> [--yes] (with confirmation). Human-readable by default; --json flag for scripting. Reuses palace_tools.py functions from T-librarian-palace-mcp-tools.

**Affected files:** scripts/palace_cli.py (new)
**Design rules:** palace DB always; no SQLite; delete requires --yes or interactive y/n
**Scope boundary:** IN: ls/read/search/edit/delete for adc.palace nodes. OUT: flat table browser (psql covers that), bulk export, multi-user locking.
**Test plan:** ls returns nodes under a prefix; read returns full content; search matches known content; edit upserts and read confirms; delete with --yes removes node.
